zh.lifeSummary: 當Rose Whetenhall於大約1508年出生在英國肯特時，她的父親William Whetenhall III52歲，母親Anne Cromer40歲。她於大約1528年與Thomas Wilford在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rose Whetenhall于大约1508年出生在英国肯特时，她的父亲William Whetenhall III52岁，母亲Anne Cromer40岁。她于大约1528年与Thomas Wilford在英国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Rose
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Ostensibly from the vocabulary word denoting the flower (Latin rosa). However, the name was in use throughout the Middle Ages, long before any of the other girls' names derived from flowers, which are generally of 19th-century origin. In part it may refer to the flower as a symbol of the Virgin Mary, but it seems more likely that it also has a Germanic origin, probably as a short form of various girls' names based on hros ‘horse’ or hrōd ‘fame’. The Latinate form Rohesia is commonly found in documents of the Middle Ages. As well as being a name in its own right, it is currently used as a short form of Rosemary and, less often (because of their different pronunciation), of other names beginning Ros-, such as Rosalind and Rosamund .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Rose Whetenhall was born about 1508, in Kent, England, her father, William Whetenhall III, was 52 and her mother, Anne Cromer, was 40. She married Thomas Wilford about 1528, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rose Whetenhall est née environ 1508, à Kent, Angleterre, son père, William Whetenhall III, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Anne Cromer, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Wilford environ 1528, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rose Whetenhall um 1508 in Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Whetenhall III 52 und ihre Mutter Anne Cromer 40. Sie hat um 1528 in England Thomas Wilford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rose Whetenhall è nata il circa 1508 nel Kent, England, sua padre, William Whetenhall III, aveva 52 anni e sua madre, Anne Cromer, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Wilford circa 1528, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia.

ko.lifeSummary: Rose Whetenhall(이)가 대략 1508년 영국 켄트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Whetenhall III(은)는 52세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Cromer(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 대략 1528년 영국에서 Thomas Wilford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rose Whetenhall nasceu aproximadamente 1508, em Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Whetenhall III, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Anne Cromer, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Wilford aproximadamente 1528, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rose Whetenhall родилась около 1508 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени William Whetenhall III было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Anne Cromer, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Wilford около 1528 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rose Whetenhall nació aproximadamente 1508, en Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, William Whetenhall III, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Anne Cromer, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Thomas Wilford aproximadamente 1528, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija.
